title: Normalize task graph JSON

verification_commands.command: /usr/bin/env -i PATH=/usr/bin:/bin python3 scripts/normalize-task-graph.py generated/task_graph.raw.json -o generated/task_graph.normalized.json --index generated/task_graph.index.json --report generated/task_graph.normalize_report.json
verification_commands.output: normalize-task-graph: wrote generated/task_graph.normalized.json and generated/task_graph.index.json with 11 task(s)
normalize-task-graph: validation failed with 1 error(s); see generated/fixtures/task_graph.missing-required.normalize_report.json

checks.name: required_columns_validated
checks.detail: Normalizer fails if the raw graph header differs from the Task Graph v0 column set.

checks.name: required_execution_fields_validated
checks.detail: Normalizer requires task_id, allowed_paths, blocked_paths, verification_gate, rollback_plan, proof_uri, and execution_cell.

checks.name: booleans_normalized
checks.detail: simulation_required is converted from TRUE/FALSE text into JSON booleans.

checks.name: lists_normalized
checks.detail: parent_id, inputs, target_artifacts, allowed_paths, and blocked_paths are emitted as arrays.

checks.name: task_ids_enforced
checks.detail: task_id values must match LPS-000 style and be unique.

checks.name: index_emitted
checks.detail: generated/task_graph.index.json maps task IDs to status, parents, proof URI, source row, and execution cell.

drift_or_blockers: generated/task_graph.raw.json currently covers the active execution/proof rows LPS-012 through LPS-022, not the older planning rows LPS-000 through LPS-011.
LPS-013 preserves the MVP boundary and does not expand into Hermes, Odysseus, full company hierarchy, or standalone Mirofish.
